senses.gloss: large in area, extensive, vast; broad; wide; open; spacious, roomy

examples.text: قَالُوا أَلَمْ تَكُنْ أَرْضُ اللّٰهِ وَاسِعَةً فَتُهَاجِرُوا فِيهَا
examples.english: [The angels] will respond, “Was Allah’s earth not spacious enough for you to emigrate?”

senses.gloss: large in area, extensive, vast; broad; wide; open; loose, oversized
large in area, extensive, vast; broad; wide; open; open, broad
large in area, extensive, vast; broad; wide; open; extensive, deep
open, up for discussion, discussable, undetermined
open, up for discussion, discussable, undetermined; debateable, not fixed

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of وَسُعَ (wasuʕa, “to be wide”) and وَسِعَ (wasiʕa, “to be wide, to hold, to contain”).
